marketplaceOrders.partialLoadNote: Some listings may not appear as their markets maybe busy.
marketplaceOrders.noLinkedWalletsDescription: Link a wallet to your account to see your marketplace orders.
marketplaceOrders.listingsDescription: Active sale listings you've posted across OpenSea and Rarible. Each card shows incoming bids underneath.
marketplaceOrders.noListingsDescription: Listings you create on a domain detail page will show up here.
marketplaceOrders.offersDescription: Bids you've placed on domains you don't own. Sorted by highest price first.
marketplaceOrders.noOffersDescription: Offers you place on other domains will show up here.
marketplaceOrders.offerWaiting: Your offer is open and waiting for the seller to accept.

previouslyOwned.title: Previously Owned Domains
previouslyOwned.emptyDescription: You haven't burned or transferred any domains away from your linked wallets yet

unsupportedChain.title: Marketplace listings aren't supported on {chain} yet

exportBlocked.title: Marketplace listing unavailable
exportBlocked.description: Listing on Web3 marketplaces isn't allowed while this domain is exportable to other registrars. <link>Contact support</link> to disable export.

listings.title: Current listings
listings.description: Active sale listings across supported marketplaces.
listings.empty: No active listings. Use “Create listing” to put this domain up for sale.
listings.cancelledDescription: It will disappear from marketplaces within a moment.

offers.title: Incoming offers
offers.description: Bids placed on this domain across supported marketplaces. Accepting an offer transfers the NFT to the bidder and credits you the bid amount.
offers.empty: No active offers. When a buyer places a bid it will appear here.

createListing.title: Create listing
createListing.description: Sell this domain on OpenSea. The listing is signed by your wallet and posted to OpenSea's Seaport orderbook.
createListing.noMarketplaces: No marketplaces support this network yet.
createListing.allListed: This domain is already listed on every supported marketplace. Cancel an existing listing to relist.
createListing.feeEstimateTooltip: Final fees are computed by the marketplace at signing time.
createListing.zeroBalanceWarning: This wallet has no {symbol} to cover the network fee for the listing approval. Add funds to continue.
createListing.networkFeeTooltip: Posting the listing is a gasless signature. The first listing of an NFT also needs a one-time on-chain approval so the marketplace can transfer it when it sells — this is the estimated network fee for that approval.
createListing.listedToastDescription: It may take a moment to appear on the marketplace.
createListing.connectWalletError: Connect a wallet to list this domain.
createListing.alreadyListedError: This domain already has an active listing there.
createListing.alreadyListedErrorDescription: Cancel the existing listing before creating a new one.
createListing.invalidPrice: Enter a valid price greater than 0.
createListing.switchNetwork: Switch to the correct network to continue.
createListing.errorInsufficientFunds: Wallet does not have enough native ETH for the approval transaction.
createListing.errorNotConfigured: The marketplace integration is not configured for this environment.
createListing.errorRateLimited: The marketplace is rate-limiting requests right now. Wait a minute and try again.
createListing.errorSeaportUnavailable: Couldn't reach OpenSea's Seaport contract on this network. Make sure your wallet is connected to the same chain as the domain NFT, then try again.
